intro: Pleonotoma flava is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as the Yellow Trumpet Creeper. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Pleonotoma flava include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
